product_definition.title: Save & Progression System
product_definition.description: A robust save and player progression system for UE5.5. Supports multiple save slots, async save/load, player level and XP tracking, achievement unlocks, persistent world state, and cloud save readiness via abstract backend interface.
product_definition.target_audience: RPG, action-adventure, and roguelite game developers

core_features: Multiple save slots with metadata (timestamp, playtime, level, thumbnail)
Async save and load via background thread, OnSaveComplete delegate
UProgressionComponent: XP, player level, level-up events
Achievement system: DataAsset-driven achievement definitions, unlock tracking
Persistent world state: doors opened, items collected, flags set
ISaveableActor interface: SaveState() / LoadState() per-actor contract
Versioned save format with migration support
Cloud save abstraction: ICloudSaveBackend interface for EOS/Steam
Save slot UMG widget: thumbnail, playtime, delete confirmation

demo_map_requirements.test_scenario: Player collects item, saves game, reloads scene, item remains collected
